## Type

## Checks

* [ ] No unrelated feature added
* [ ] Build passes
* [ ] Unit tests pass
* [ ] Lint passes
* [ ] Existing navigation unchanged unless intended
* [ ] Existing UI unchanged unless intended
* [ ] Database migration added if schema changed
* [ ] Room schema updated if database changed
* [ ] No destructive migration
* [ ] Existing tests updated if behavior changed
* [ ] Screens previewed if UI changed

## Manual verification

* [ ] App launches
* [ ] Summary works
* [ ] Weight works
* [ ] Sleep works
* [ ] Bottom nav works
